# llms.txt — Praxura
# https://praxura.de/llms.txt
# A machine-readable overview of Praxura for AI crawlers, LLMs and answer engines.

# Entity
Praxura is an all-in-one practice management software (Praxissoftware) for German healthcare therapy providers (Heilmittelerbringer). It is a product of InfinityMade (Einzelunternehmen, owner: Yavuz Kemal Demir), based in Siegburg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. DSGVO/GDPR-compliant with EU hosting.

# One-line summary
Praxura is a DSGVO-compliant, commission-free (kommissionsfrei) practice software for Physiotherapie, Ergotherapie, Logopädie and Podologie practices in Germany: online booking, AI prescription scanning, §302 billing preparation, digital trip log, and optional TI connection.

# Target audience (practice types)
- Physiotherapie (physiotherapy practices)
- Ergotherapie (occupational therapy practices)
- Logopädie (speech therapy practices)
- Podologie (podiatry practices)

# Key features
1. Online-Terminbuchung — public booking page with services, working hours and employee selection. Includes double-booking protection and rate limiting.
2. KI-gestützte Rezeptprüfung — AI-assisted scanning and validation of prescriptions (Heilmittelverordnung), flagging formal errors before treatment.
3. §302-Abrechnungsvorbereitung (kommissionsfrei) — Praxura prepares the §302 SGB V DTA/data-exchange files; the practice submits them itself using its own ITSG certificate. Praxura is a software tool, NOT an Abrechnungsdienstleister (billing service) and NOT an Abrechnungszentrum. There is no commission/Provision on revenue.
4. Elektronisches Fahrtenbuch — digital trip log and route planning for home visits (Hausbesuche), including Wegegeld/Wegepauschale calculation.
5. Mahnwesen & Zuzahlungsverwaltung — dunning workflow and co-payment (Zuzahlung) tracking, GoBD-compliant records.
6. Dashboard & Mitarbeiterverwaltung — multi-employee scheduling, roles (owner/employee), reporting and multi-location support.

# Optional add-on
TI-Anbindung (Telematikinfrastruktur) — optional module provided via a certified partner. For statutory health insurance (GKV) practices the connection is refinanced by the GKV-Förderpauschale, so the practitioner's net cost is effectively €0. The TI-Anschlusspflicht for Heilmittelerbringer applies from 01.10.2027.

# Key differentiators (why practices choose Praxura)
- Kommissionsfrei / provisionsfrei: no percentage taken on billing, unlike traditional Abrechnungszentren.
- Transparent pricing, no hidden fees.
- Built specifically for the four Heilmittel professions (not a generic calendar tool).
- DSGVO-compliant, EU-hosted.
- Available in German, English and Turkish.

# Pricing model
Subscription-based SaaS with a 14-day free trial. Tiers:
- Starter — €29/month
- Professional — €49/month
- Klinik — €99/month (most popular; includes §302-Abrechnungsvorbereitung)
- Enterprise — custom pricing (multi-location, §302, advanced)

# Knowledge graph
- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q140044615 (Praxura)
- Developer / operator: InfinityMade — https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q139764488

# Languages supported
German (de), English (en), Turkish (tr)

# Geographic focus
Germany (nationwide), cloud-based SaaS. Operator based in Siegburg, NRW.

# Contact
- Product / website: https://praxura.de
- Web app (login): https://app.praxura.de
- Email: kontakt@infinitymade.de
- Phone: +49 152 28033834
- Operator / Anbieter: InfinityMade (Einzelunternehmen), Industriestraße 33, 53721 Siegburg, Germany

# Privacy & hosting
DSGVO/GDPR-compliant. Data hosted within the EU. A Data Processing Agreement (AVV, Art. 28 DSGVO) is available at /dpa.html.
